_description: TGC Shop products — single source of truth. Update partner links here.

categories.name: Vaporisers
categories.description: Dry-herb vaporisers for medical cannabis patients. Every device on this page has been tested against UK clinic standards.

categories.name: Accessories
categories.description: Dosing capsules, glass stems, replacement parts, and the bits that make daily use smoother.

categories.name: Seeds & Growing
categories.description: Cannabis seeds from trusted UK seedbanks. For souvenir and educational purposes only — germination may be illegal in your jurisdiction.

products.name: Storz & Bickel Mighty+
products.description: The vaporiser UK clinics implicitly recommend. Medical device certified, hybrid convection-conduction heating, USB-C charging. The most consistent vapour quality of any portable on the market.

products.name: Storz & Bickel Volcano Hybrid
products.description: The defining desktop vaporiser. Dual balloon and whip delivery, precise digital temperature control, and the build quality that made S&B the reference brand in medical cannabis.

products.name: Storz & Bickel VENTY
products.description: 20-second heat-up, adjustable airflow, 130-watt heater. The VENTY is S&B's newest and most powerful portable — unmatched draw resistance control for patients with respiratory considerations.

products.name: Storz & Bickel Crafty+
products.description: Same vapour quality as the Mighty+ in a genuinely pocketable body. The smallest S&B portable — ideal for patients who need medical-grade vapour on the move.

products.name: DaVinci IQ3
products.description: Fully adjustable airflow dial, removable 18650 battery, and 0.1°C temperature precision. The only portable that lets you tune draw resistance to match your lung capacity.

products.name: S&B Dosing Capsule Set (40pk)
products.description: The essential accessory for Mighty+, Crafty+, and VENTY users. Fill a week's worth of doses in advance. Reduces chamber cleaning and makes on-the-go medication clean and discreet.

products.name: The Vault Cannabis Seeds Store
products.description: One of the UK's longest-running cannabis seed banks. Hundreds of strains from breeders worldwide — discreet shipping, germination guides, and regular promotions.
